plugin.name: Core - ESP + scripts
plugin.description: Required. Installs SNPlayerNeeds.esp and the tracker script: reports the player's potion/food/ingredient consumption to SkyrimNet as native Player Reactions events (Player Ate Food / Drank Potion / Ate Ingredient / Consumed), and registers the snpn_drunk and snpn_holds_liquor decorators used by the Intoxication prompt.

plugin.name: Survival Needs prompt
plugin.description: Recommended. Adds a first-person SkyrimNet bio section describing the player's hunger, thirst, cold, and exhaustion, read from CC Survival Mode / SMI / LoreRim thirst effects via has_magic_effect. Safe to skip if you don't run a survival mod.

plugin.name: Intoxication prompt
plugin.description: Recommended. Adds a SkyrimNet bio section describing how drunk an actor is (player or NPC), driven by the snpn_drunk decorator from Core. Portable across modlists (Requiem, CACO, Last Seed, SunHelm, Conner's, Alcoholic Lite) and aware of "holds their liquor" perks. Requires Core.
